executive_summary: NYEnglishTeacher.com scores 74/100 — a solid B grade with exceptional messaging and social proof. The 'performance coaching, not ESL' positioning is the site's strongest asset, supported by 15 named testimonials from C-suite executives at recognizable companies. The biggest strategic issue is pricing: at $25 USD/session, the price directly contradicts the premium Fortune 100 strategist positioning. Raising prices 4-6x and adding a post-assessment email nurture sequence could increase monthly revenue by $3,000-$8,000 without adding a single new client.

findings.finding: Pricing at $25 USD/session contradicts premium executive positioning. Executive communication coaching typically commands $150-$500/hr. Current pricing leaves 80-90% of revenue on the table.
No confirmed analytics or conversion tracking. Cannot measure organic performance, attribute leads, or optimize conversion paths.
CTA fragmentation — four different phrasings route to the same booking destination, creating cognitive load and reducing click-through.
No post-assessment email nurture sequence. The 90-second assessment captures leads but has no mechanism to convert them over time.
Zero urgency or scarcity signals anywhere on the site. Solo practitioner has genuinely limited availability but doesn't communicate it.
No hreflang tags confirmed for EN/ES bilingual pages. Risk of duplicate content treatment by search engines.
No video testimonials. For a communication coach, audio/video proof would be the most compelling format.
Domain name 'NY English Teacher' pulls the brand downmarket — signals ESL tutoring, not C-suite executive coaching.

quick_wins: Standardize all CTAs to one phrase: 'Book Your Free Strategy Session' — eliminates cognitive fragmentation
Add urgency signals: 'Next available slot: [date]' or '3 consultation slots remaining this week'
Install GA4 with 3 conversion events: form submission, chat engagement, assessment completion
Add hreflang tags and generate sitemap.xml via Astro integration
Add BlogPosting schema to blog template and Review schema to testimonials page
medium_term: Raise prices 4-6x: $100-$150/session individual, $200-$400 C-suite. Grandfather existing clients.
Build 3-email post-assessment nurture sequence to convert assessment leads over 7 days
Create 3 outcome-based case studies with before/after metrics from top clients
Launch tiered pricing page: Self-paced, Group ($75-$100), Executive ($150-$250), Corporate (custom)
Add 1-2 video testimonials from C-suite clients — 60-second smartphone recordings
strategic: Launch group coaching cohorts: 6-8 person, 8-week programs at $500-$800 per person
Build a corporate landing page with separate messaging, ROI calculator, and custom quote form
Create a referral program: one free session per converted referral from 200+ coached leaders
Pursue ICF ACC certification for corporate procurement credibility
